description: Brute-force CICO calibration baseline on the REAL open instance. A relaxed CICO solution: both constrained output words have their low m bits zero. Calibration only -- exact solve needs the algebraic attack.

result.meaning: low 12 bits of BOTH constrained output words are zero

performance.machine: developer laptop, 1 thread, release LTO build

extrapolation.conclusion: Brute force infeasible. Algebraic resultant/GCD attack is mandatory; this baseline only calibrates the search rate and confirms the gap.
